name: Documentation Issue
description: Documentation improvements or clarity issues

labels: ["documentation"]

## Documentation Type
- [ ] Data specification or dictionary
- [ ] Methodology or workflow guide
- [ ] Setup or installation instructions
- [ ] API or function documentation
- [ ] Station metadata or description
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Current Content
*Link to the documentation or quote the relevant section*

## Issue Description
*What is unclear, incorrect, or missing?*

## Suggested Improvement
*Provide the corrected or improved text, or describe the needed changes*

## Additional Context
*Any additional information that would be helpful*

---
**Checklist:**
- [ ] Documentation location clearly identified
- [ ] Issue is specific and actionable
- [ ] Suggested improvement is clear
